signal: Post-compaction closeout recall hardening pattern: pre-compact.sh writes compacted=true to guard file; user-prompt-submit.sh detects flag and injects one-shot <wai-post-compact> block directing model to read skill file before acting; flag cleared after injection. Prevents silent skill reconstruction from degraded context.
rationale: Context compaction silently strips skill knowledge. Without explicit re-read directive, model reconstructs closeout from memory which degrades. One-shot injection avoids noise on every subsequent turn.
